# nostr-core

> Comprehensive Nostr protocol toolkit and NWC client for JavaScript/TypeScript. 37 NIPs implemented: wallet operations (NIP-47), signing (NIP-07, NIP-46), encryption (NIP-04, NIP-44), relay management (NIP-11, NIP-42, NIP-65), social features (NIP-02, NIP-09, NIP-10, NIP-18, NIP-22, NIP-25, NIP-27, NIP-28, NIP-30, NIP-31, NIP-56), content (NIP-23, NIP-24, NIP-36, NIP-40, NIP-51), identity (NIP-05, NIP-06, NIP-19, NIP-21), messaging (NIP-17, NIP-59), payments (NIP-57, NIP-98), groups (NIP-29), badges (NIP-58), search (NIP-50), proof-of-work (NIP-13), and bridging (NIP-48).

nostr-core lets agents and applications pay invoices, check balances, create invoices, and listen for payments through any NWC-compatible Lightning wallet. Beyond wallet operations, it provides a unified Signer interface, comprehensive NIP implementations for social interactions, content publishing, identity verification, group messaging, badges, zaps, and more. One connection string, zero framework dependencies, auto-encryption. Works in Node.js 18+, Deno, Bun, and Cloudflare Workers. Free and open source (MIT).

## Guides

- [Introduction](guide/introduction.md): What NWC is, why nostr-core exists, what's included
- [Installation](guide/installation.md): npm/pnpm/yarn setup, requirements, dependency overview
- [Quick Start](guide/quick-start.md): Connect to a wallet, pay invoices, create invoices, listen for payments
- [Wallet Operations](guide/wallet-operations.md): Every NWC method with parameters, return values, and examples
- [Encryption](guide/encryption.md): NIP-04 vs NIP-44, auto-detection, direct usage
- [Relays](guide/relays.md): Relay and RelayPool usage for custom Nostr applications
- [Error Handling](guide/error-handling.md): Typed error hierarchy, catch patterns, timeouts
- [Comparison](guide/comparison.md): nostr-core vs @getalby/sdk - install size, dependency count, feature parity

## API Reference

- [NWC](api/nwc.md): Main NWC client class - constructor, wallet methods, notifications, event emitter
- [Lightning Address](api/lightning-address.md): fetchInvoice, validateLightningAddress, parseLightningAddress
- [Fiat Conversion](api/fiat.md): getExchangeRate, fiatToSats, satsToFiat - zero-dependency fiat currency conversion
- [Types](api/types.md): All TypeScript types - Transaction, requests, responses, notifications, FiatRate, FiatConversion
- [Errors](api/errors.md): Error class hierarchy with codes (8 classes including LightningAddressError, FiatConversionError)
- [Crypto](api/crypto.md): Key generation (generateSecretKey, getPublicKey)
- [Event](api/event.md): Nostr event signing, verification, hashing
- [Relay](api/relay.md): Single relay WebSocket connection and subscriptions
- [RelayPool](api/pool.md): Multi-relay connection management
- [Filter](api/filter.md): Event filtering types and match functions
- [Signer](api/signer.md): Unified Signer interface for secret keys, browser extensions (NIP-07), and remote signers (NIP-46) with NIP-04 and NIP-44 encryption
- [NIP-02](api/nip02.md): Follow list / contact list (createFollowListEvent, parseFollowList, isFollowing)
- [NIP-04](api/nip04.md): AES-256-CBC encryption (legacy)
- [NIP-05](api/nip05.md): DNS-based verification (queryNip05, verifyNip05, parseNip05Address)
- [NIP-06](api/nip06.md): Key derivation from mnemonic (generateMnemonic, mnemonicToKey, deriveKey)
- [NIP-07](api/nip07.md): Browser extension signing via window.nostr (Nip07Signer) with NIP-04 and NIP-44 encryption
- [NIP-09](api/nip09.md): Event deletion (createDeletionEvent, parseDeletion, isDeletionOf)
- [NIP-10](api/nip10.md): Text note threads (parseThread, buildThreadTags)
- [NIP-11](api/nip11.md): Relay information document (fetchRelayInfo, supportsNip)
- [NIP-13](api/nip13.md): Proof of work (minePow, verifyPow, getPowDifficulty)
- [NIP-17](api/nip17.md): Private Direct Messages - end-to-end encrypted DMs with sender anonymity (wrapDirectMessage, unwrapDirectMessage)
- [NIP-18](api/nip18.md): Reposts (createRepostEvent, parseRepost) - kind 6 text note reposts, kind 16 generic reposts
- [NIP-19](api/nip19.md): Bech32 encoding/decoding (npub, nsec, note, nprofile, nevent, naddr)
- [NIP-21](api/nip21.md): nostr: URI scheme (encodeNostrURI, decodeNostrURI, isNostrURI)
- [NIP-22](api/nip22.md): Comments (createCommentEvent, parseComment)
- [NIP-23](api/nip23.md): Long-form content (createLongFormEvent, parseLongForm)
- [NIP-24](api/nip24.md): Extra metadata fields (parseExtendedMetadata, buildMetadataContent, parseUniversalTags)
- [NIP-25](api/nip25.md): Reactions (createReactionEvent, parseReaction)
- [NIP-27](api/nip27.md): Text note references (extractReferences, replaceReferences)
- [NIP-28](api/nip28.md): Public chat channels (createChannelEvent, createChannelMessageEvent, parseChannelMetadata)
- [NIP-29](api/nip29.md): Relay-based groups (createGroupChatEvent, parseGroupMetadata, parseGroupMembers)
- [NIP-30](api/nip30.md): Custom emoji (parseCustomEmojis, buildEmojiTags, extractEmojiShortcodes)
- [NIP-31](api/nip31.md): Unknown event kinds (addAltTag, getAltTag)
- [NIP-36](api/nip36.md): Sensitive content / content warning (addContentWarning, getContentWarning, hasContentWarning)
- [NIP-40](api/nip40.md): Expiration timestamp (addExpiration, getExpiration, isExpired)
- [NIP-42](api/nip42.md): Client authentication to relays (createAuthEvent, verifyAuthEvent, relay.auth)
- [NIP-44](api/nip44.md): ChaCha20 authenticated encryption (recommended)
- [NIP-46](api/nip46.md): Remote signing via Nostr Connect (NostrConnect class) - bunker:// URIs, multi-relay fallback, NIP-44 encryption, app metadata
- [NIP-48](api/nip48.md): Proxy tags for bridged events (addProxyTag, getProxyTags, isProxied)
- [NIP-50](api/nip50.md): Search (buildSearchFilter, parseSearchQuery, buildSearchQuery)
- [NIP-51](api/nip51.md): Lists with encrypted private items (createListEvent, parseList)
- [NIP-56](api/nip56.md): Reporting (createReportEvent, parseReport) - nudity, spam, impersonation, etc.
- [NIP-57](api/nip57.md): Lightning zaps (createZapRequestEvent, parseZapReceipt, validateZapReceipt, fetchZapInvoice)
- [NIP-58](api/nip58.md): Badges (createBadgeDefinitionEvent, createBadgeAwardEvent, parseBadgeDefinition)
- [NIP-59](api/nip59.md): Gift Wrap - multi-layer event encryption for metadata protection (createRumor, createSeal, createWrap, unwrap)
- [NIP-65](api/nip65.md): Relay List Metadata - user relay preferences for read/write routing (parseRelayList, createRelayListEvent, getReadRelays, getWriteRelays)
- [NIP-98](api/nip98.md): HTTP Auth (createHttpAuthEvent, getAuthorizationHeader, verifyHttpAuthEvent)
- LNURL Protocol: encodeLnurl(), decodeLnurl(), isLnurl(), resolveUrl(), fetchPayRequest(), requestInvoice(), fetchWithdrawRequest(), submitWithdrawRequest(), parseLnurlMetadata(), parseSuccessAction(), decryptAesSuccessAction(), verifyPayment() — LUD-01/03/06/09/10/12/17/18/20/21
- [Utils](api/utils.md): normalizeURL, bytesToHex, hexToBytes, randomBytes

## Agent Integration

- [Agent Integration Guide](/AGENT_README.md): Complete guide for AI agents with request/response examples
- [Integration Prompt](llm/integration-prompt.md): Copy-paste system prompt and code templates for agent developers
- [Full Documentation](llms-full.txt): All documentation in a single file for LLM context
